summary: Dynamoid's science education work has received federal SBIR support from NSF and NIH, along with accelerator support from 500 Global. NSF SBIR Phase I award 1014425 supported Powers of Minus Ten. NIH/HHS SBIR support under base award GM146471, including R43GM146471 and R44GM146471, has supported 10k Science development. Dynamoid also participated in 500 Global's flagship accelerator program, formerly known as 500 Startups.

awards.program: SBIR Phase I and Phase II

accelerator_support: 500 Global flagship accelerator program, formerly known as 500 Startups
